person.name: Sichen Tao
person.current_title_note: Official public sources also note a specially appointed appointment wording in SENAC materials effective 2025-10-01.
person.affiliation: High Performance Computing Laboratory, Cyberscience Center, Tohoku University
person.bio: Researcher working at the intersection of artificial intelligence, deep learning, brain-inspired neural networks, optimization, and high-performance computing, with applications in wind farm layout optimization, healthcare AI, human-robot collaboration, and AI for science.
memberships: The Japan Society for Evolutionary Computation

awards.title: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025 Competition Champion
awards.description: Champion of the bound-constrained single-objective numerical optimization competition track at the IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025.
awards.context: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) is a world-class event in evolutionary computation and one of the flagship conferences of the IEEE Computational Intelligence Society.

awards.title: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025 Competition Champion
awards.description: Champion of the constrained single-objective numerical optimization competition track at the IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025.
awards.context: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) is a world-class event in evolutionary computation and one of the flagship conferences of the IEEE Computational Intelligence Society.

awards.title: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025 Competition Champion
awards.description: Champion of the bound-constrained multi-objective numerical optimization competition track at the IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025.
awards.context: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) is a world-class event in evolutionary computation and one of the flagship conferences of the IEEE Computational Intelligence Society.

awards.title: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025 Competition Champion
awards.description: Champion of the constrained multi-objective numerical optimization competition track at the IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2025.
awards.context: IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) is a world-class event in evolutionary computation and one of the flagship conferences of the IEEE Computational Intelligence Society.

awards.title: IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (WCCI) 2024 Competition Silver Award
awards.description: Silver award in the numerical optimization competition track at the IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (WCCI) 2024.
awards.context: IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (WCCI) is the world's largest technical event on computational intelligence, bringing together the three flagship conferences of the IEEE Computational Intelligence Society under one roof.

awards.title: Japan Science and Technology Agency (JST) Support for Pioneering Research Initiated by the Next Generation (SPRING) Fellowship Recipient
awards.description: Japan Science and Technology Agency (JST), Support for Pioneering Research Initiated by the Next Generation (SPRING).
awards.context: JST explains that SPRING selects outstanding PhD students and provides sustained support for research and living expenses as well as career development opportunities, enabling them to pursue unrestricted, challenging, and interdisciplinary research.
awards.program_name: Support for Pioneering Research Initiated by the Next Generation

awards.title: Japan Science and Technology Agency (JST) University Fellowship Recipient
awards.description: Japan Science and Technology Agency (JST), Establishment of University Fellowships towards the Creation of Science, Technology and Innovation.
awards.context: JST explains that this program supports universities under integrated university-wide strategies so they can nurture excellent doctoral students who will drive future science, technology, and innovation in Japan.
awards.program_name: Establishment of University Fellowships towards the Creation of Science, Technology and Innovation

awards.title: JGC-S Scholarship Recipient
awards.description: Awarded the JGC-S Scholarship through the designated-university nomination process.
awards.context: The JGC-S Scholarship Foundation is a public-interest foundation supporting self-financed international students in science and engineering at designated universities in Japan.

awards.title: Asahi International Education Foundation Scholarship Recipient
awards.description: Awarded the Asahi International Education Foundation Scholarship as a selected international student in Toyama.
awards.context: The Asahi International Education Foundation provides financial aid to selected international college students in Toyama from ASEAN and other countries.

awards.title: ESI Highly Cited Paper
awards.description: Recognized by Clarivate Essential Science Indicators (ESI) as a Highly Cited Paper, placing the paper in the worldwide top 1% by citations for its field and publication year.
awards.paper_title: A State-of-the-Art Differential Evolution Algorithm for Parameter Estimation of Solar Photovoltaic Models

open_source_projects: Artificial Visual System for Motion Direction Detection modeled by retina neuroscientific knowledge.
Deep neural network implementations for motion direction detection.
Wind farm layout optimization benchmark platform coded in MATLAB.
Spherical Search Algorithm with memory-guided population stage-wise control for bound-constrained optimization.
Level-direction guided hierarchical genetic learning particle swarm optimization for wind farm layout optimization.
Potential-unleashed high performance differential evolution for wind farm layout optimization.
Reconstructed differential evolution variant for the CEC2024 competition.
AI-powered mortality-risk modeling workflow for VA-ECMO patients.

source_notes.title: Title wording across official sources
source_notes.body: Public sources differ slightly: Takizawa Lab and J-GLOBAL describe the role as "Assistant Professor", while the SENAC staff notice identifies the appointment as "Specially Appointed Assistant Professor" in the Supercomputing Research Division.

source_notes.title: Scope of the record
source_notes.body: This dossier synthesizes public internet sources only. Counts can differ across Google Scholar and J-GLOBAL because the underlying databases index different records.

source_notes.title: Google Scholar rate limiting
source_notes.body: Google Scholar temporarily returned HTTP 429 during automated refresh. When that happened, this script reused the live stats already captured in-session and normalized publication metadata through OpenAlex and Crossref.

source_notes.title: Publication metric evidence
source_notes.body: IF and JCR links now prioritize official Clarivate Journal Citation Reports journal-profile pages for the traced year. The site keeps supporting source links alongside the official JCR path for redundancy.

source_notes.title: CAS ranking evidence
source_notes.body: The official CAS Journal Ranking platform is fenqubiao.com. Direct journal detail pages are not consistently public, so the portal keeps accessible per-journal support pages for visible quartile values while archiving official CAS platform materials locally.

source_notes.title: CCF venue ranking evidence
source_notes.body: The portal archives official CCF ranking materials locally, including the 2022 recommended international conferences and journals PDF and current official portal pages.

source_notes.title: Update cadence
source_notes.body: This portal was regenerated on the same date as the dossier snapshot and supplements it with the current CV-only entries not yet present in the indexed record.

source_links.label: Tohoku University Cyberscience Center research division page

event_intro: My name is Sichen Tao, and I joined the institute on October 1st. This is my first assignment in the Tohoku region, and I am very excited to begin a new chapter of my research life in Sendai, a city rich in nature and full of energy.

My research focuses primarily on artificial intelligence (AI), including fundamental technologies such as machine learning, deep learning, reinforcement learning, brain-inspired neural networks, computational intelligence, and optimization. I am also engaged in applying these techniques to various domains such as new energy systems, high-performance computing (HPC), Industry 5.0, autonomous driving, human-machine collaboration systems, healthcare, AI for science, and automated AI algorithm design.

My hobbies include sports, singing, photography, traveling, and computer games. I value broadening my perspectives through diverse experiences and incorporating fresh ideas into my research and teaching.
I look forward to working with you all.

senac.appointment_line: スーパーコンピューティング研究部 特任助教

dissertation.title: Development of Artificial Intelligence Systems for Data Analysis and Optimization Based on Brain-inspired and Evolutionary Intelligence
dissertation.author: 陶, 思晨
